zh.lifeSummary: 當Millicent de Cantilupe於大約1246年出生在英國維爾爾卡爾內時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny26歲，母親Eva de Braose19歲。她於大約1268年與Eudes la Zouche在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1299年1月7日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Millicent de Cantilupe于大约1246年出生在英国維爾爾卡爾內时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny26岁，母亲Eva de Braose19岁。她于大约1268年与Eudes la Zouche在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1299年1月7日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Millicent de Cantilupe was born about 1246, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, was 26 and her mother, Eva de Braose, was 19. She married Eudes la Zouche about 1268, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 7 January 1299, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Millicent de Cantilupe est née environ 1246, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eva de Braose, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes la Zouche environ 1268, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1299, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Millicent de Cantilupe um 1246 in Calne, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny 26 und ihre Mutter Eva de Braose 19. Sie hat um 1268 in England Eudes la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1299 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent de Cantilupe è nata il circa 1246 nel Calne, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Eva de Braose, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Eudes la Zouche circa 1268, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1299, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Millicent de Cantilupeが約1246年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavennyは26歳，母Eva de Braoseは19歳であった。約1268年にイギリスでEudes la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1299年1月7日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Millicent de Cantilupe(이)가 대략 1246년 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Braose(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1268년 영국에서 Eudes la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1299년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent de Cantilupe nasceu aproximadamente 1246, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Braose, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes la Zouche aproximadamente 1268, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1299, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Millicent de Cantilupe родилась около 1246 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva de Braose, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes la Zouche около 1268 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 7 января 1299 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Millicent de Cantilupe nació aproximadamente 1246, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eva de Braose, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eudes la Zouche aproximadamente 1268, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1299, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
